agents.label: Agents
agents.description: Specialized Claude agents and expert roles.
agents.seoDescription: Browse specialized Claude agents, expert role prompts, and reusable AI operator profiles with source links, usage notes, and review-ready metadata.
agents.usageHint: Copy the full prompt into a Claude agent definition and adapt it to your workflow.
quickstart: Open the full asset and review the role boundaries.
Copy the complete prompt into your Claude agent definition.
Test on a small task before using it in regular work.

mcp.label: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Model Context Protocol servers and integrations.
mcp.seoDescription: Discover Model Context Protocol servers for Claude and AI coding tools, including install commands, config snippets, source links, and trust signals.
mcp.usageHint: Install the server, copy the Claude config, then verify the connection in Claude Code.
quickstart: Run the install command from a trusted source.
Copy the Claude config into your MCP configuration.
Restart Claude Code and verify the server responds.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: Apps, developer tools, services, and products for Claude-native builders.
tools.seoDescription: Explore Claude-native apps, developer tools, services, and products with reviewed listings, pricing context, source links, and disclosure signals.
tools.usageHint: Use this surface for vetted apps and services. Sponsored and affiliate relationships must be disclosed.
quickstart: Open the website and verify the product matches your use case.
Review pricing, source links, and any sponsorship disclosure.
Submit corrections or request a listing through the tools intake form.

skills.label: Skills
skills.description: Source-backed skill packs and reusable capabilities.
skills.seoDescription: Find source-backed Agent Skill packages for Claude, Codex, Windsurf, Gemini, Cursor adapters, and reusable AI workflows with validation metadata.
skills.usageHint: Review the source, install command, retrieval sources, or copyable skill content before reusing prompts or scripts.
quickstart: Review the source, install command, or full copyable content.
Review retrieval sources and tested platforms.
Invoke it only for the workflows listed in the skill scope.

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Prompt guardrails, project rules, and operating constraints.
rules.seoDescription: Browse reusable Claude rules, project guardrails, operating constraints, and prompt policies for teams standardizing AI-assisted development.
rules.usageHint: Copy the full rule asset into CLAUDE.md or your project rule system instead of only taking the summary.
quickstart: Read the rule for scope and caveats.
Copy the full rule into CLAUDE.md or your rule system.
Run a normal workflow and adjust language that is too broad.

commands.label: Commands
commands.description: Slash commands and reusable command prompts.
commands.seoDescription: Discover Claude slash commands and reusable command prompts with copy-ready syntax, source assets, usage snippets, and repository-backed metadata.
commands.usageHint: Use the exact slash command syntax shown for the best starting point, then inspect the full source if needed.
quickstart: Copy the command syntax.
Paste the full command asset into your command registry.
Run it once against a safe test input.

hooks.label: Hooks
hooks.description: Claude Code hook configs and automation helpers.
hooks.seoDescription: Browse Claude Code hooks, automation helpers, trigger configs, and scripts for workflow safety, validation, telemetry, and local developer tooling.
hooks.usageHint: Install the hook script, copy the Claude config, and test the trigger locally before wider use.
quickstart: Copy the hook script into your repo.
Add the config under the listed Claude Code trigger.
Trigger it manually and inspect logs before enabling broadly.

guides.label: Guides
guides.seoDescription: Read practical Claude guides and AI workflow walkthroughs covering setup, implementation steps, troubleshooting, and source-backed recommendations.
guides.usageHint: Use guides as reference docs and implementation walkthroughs, not as standalone assets.
quickstart: Scan prerequisites first.
Follow the guide steps in order.
Use troubleshooting notes before adapting the workflow.

collections.label: Collections
collections.seoDescription: Explore curated HeyClaude collections that bundle related agents, MCP servers, skills, commands, hooks, and guides into practical workflow sets.
collections.usageHint: Start with the recommended order and then open the included entries one by one.
quickstart: Review the included entries.
Follow the recommended installation order when present.
Open each included entry for its exact commands and config.

statuslines.label: Statuslines
statuslines.seoDescription: Find Claude Code statusline scripts and workflow telemetry assets for surfacing context, health, branch state, and operational signals in your terminal.
statuslines.usageHint: Copy the Claude statusline config first, then install or adapt the script asset behind it.
quickstart: Copy the statusline config.
Install or adapt the script asset.
Run it in your shell before wiring it into Claude Code.
